subject: [PATCH v2] btrfs: fix use-after-free in move_existing_remap()

reviews.author: David Sterba
reviews.summary: Suggested changing the subject line to better reflect the actual fix being implemented, which is holding a block group reference during move_existing_remap().

2026-03-16.patch_summary: This patch fixes a use-after-free bug in the btrfs move_existing_remap() function by introducing a new variable to hold the block group reference throughout the entire function, eliminating the need for repeated lookups and put operations.
